scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.mkdirSync('.tmp-check',{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync('.tmp-check/package.json', JSON.stringify({type:'commonjs'}));" && tsc --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2022 --outDir .tmp-check src/session-machine.check.ts src/session-machine.ts src/contracts.ts && node .tmp-check/session-machine.check.js
